---
name: Import Failure (Fett263 / ProffieOS config)
about: A ProffieOS config or style snippet didn't import cleanly into KyberStation
title: "[Import] "
labels: import-failure
assignees: ''
---

## Thanks for the failing snippet!

Real failing imports are the fastest way KyberStation expands its Fett263 OS7 Style Library coverage. Every snippet you share goes into the test corpus and drives the next round of template additions.

> **Tip:** if you're filing this from KyberStation's "Report this snippet" link inside the import banner, most fields below are pre-filled. You can paste extra context and submit.

## What happened

- [ ] Pasted a single `StylePtr<...>()` snippet
- [ ] Pasted a full `config.h` with multiple presets
- [ ] Tried to load a config file via the file picker
- [ ] Other (describe below)

**What I expected:**

**What actually happened:**

## The failing snippet

> If you can share even a portion of the snippet, that's enough. KyberStation only needs the `StylePtr<...>` block — you can omit the `#define`s, `BladeConfig`, font names, and any other config.h surrounding context.

```cpp
// Paste the failing style code here
```

## KyberStation diagnostics (if visible)

- **Parse errors**: (copy/paste from the import panel's red "Errors" section, or "none")
- **Parse warnings count**: (the number in "Warnings (N):" — or "none")
- **Sample of unknown templates**: (any template names KyberStation didn't recognize — e.g. `Unknown template "BendTimePowX"`)

## Source of the snippet

- **Generated by**: Fett263 OS7 Style Library / Fett263 OS6 / hand-edited / unknown
- **Fett263 prop file version** (if known): (e.g. v2.242p)
- **Approximate date created**: (helps us know which Fett263 generator era to test against)

## Environment

- **OS**: (macOS 15.3 / Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 / etc.)
- **Browser + version**: (Chrome 132 / Brave 1.68 / Safari 17.4 / etc.)
- **KyberStation URL**: (e.g. https://kenkoller.github.io/KyberStation/, or local `pnpm dev`)
- **Active board profile** (in the StatusBar): (e.g. Proffie V3.9 / Proffie V2.2)

## Anything else

Screenshots, the broader config.h that the snippet was extracted from, links to the original generator URL — anything that helps reproduce the failure.
